bot_answer: Digital Collections contains materials such as photographs, advertising tradecards, newspapers, manuscripts, and videos from Walter Havighurst Special Collections & University Archives [3]. For submission or to discuss adding materials, contact Special Collections / University Archives at SpecColl@MiamiOH.edu or archives@miamioh.edu, and see https://spec.lib.miamioh.edu/home/ [1][2].
The liaisons page lists Roger Justus with the email justusra@miamioh.edu [1].

The University Archives contact is Archives@MiamiOH.edu, and the general Special Collections inbox is SpecColl@MiamiOH.edu [1][2]. Special Collections & University Archives is on the 3rd Floor of King Library in Oxford [1][2].
